characters.appearance: A light-skinned human hand and forearm. The skin is smooth, and the fingernails are short and unpainted.
characters.demeanor: Deliberate and precise, interacting with the screen.

scenes.supernova_script:
Unknown speaker 1 says: Good morning, thank you for inviting me to this interview. [Good morning, thank you for inviting me to this interview.]

Unknown speaker 2 says: Interview. साक्षात्कार [Interview. Interview]

Unknown speaker 1 says: I have three years of experience... [I have three years of experience...]

Unknown speaker 2 says: Experience. अनुभव [Experience. Experience]

Unknown speaker 1 says: in sales and customer service. [in sales and customer service.]

Unknown speaker 2 says: Customer. ग्राहक [Customer. Customer]

Unknown speaker 1 says: I am confident in my skills, [I am confident in my skills,]

Unknown speaker 2 says: Confident. आत्मविश्वासी [Confident. Confident]

Unknown speaker 1 says: and I always try to learn. [and I always try to learn.]

Unknown speaker 2 says: Always. हमेशा [Always. Always]

Unknown speaker 1 says: I believe I am a great fit. [I believe I am a great fit.]

Unknown speaker 2 says: Believe. मानना [Believe. To believe]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates the core app experience by showing a user practicing a real-world interview scenario instead of reading a novel.
- Highlights the AI tutor's ability to provide instant pronunciation and Hindi translations for difficult words.
- Creates a practical, encouraging tone that resonates with users looking to improve their professional English.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
रोज़ 10 मिनट SUPERNOVA के साथ ENGLISH SPEAKING PRACTICE करें (PRACTICE ENGLISH SPEAKING WITH SUPERNOVA FOR 10 MINUTES A DAY)
"Good morning, thank you for inviting me to this interview. I have three years of experience in sales and customer service. I am confident in my skills, and I always try to learn. I believe I am a great fit."
interview [ˈɪntəvjuː] साक्षात्कार | मुझे पता है (I know) | सीखना है (To learn)
experience [ɪkˈspɪərɪəns] अनुभव | मुझे पता है (I know) | सीखना है (To learn)
customer [ˈkʌstəmə] ग्राहक | मुझे पता है (I know) | सीखना है (To learn)
confident [ˈkɒnfɪdənt] आत्मविश्वासी | मुझे पता है (I know) | सीखना है (To learn)
always [ˈɔːlweɪz] हमेशा | मुझे पता है (I know) | सीखना है (To learn)
believe [bɪˈliːv] मानना | मुझे पता है (I know) | सीखना है (To learn)
